page.title: Plan & Billing
page.description: Manage your subscription, monitor usage, and upgrade your plan.

currentPlan.title: Current Plan
currentPlan.description: Your active plan and monthly token allowance.

usage.title: Usage This Period
usage.description: Tokens consumed in the current billing period.
usage.unlimited: Unlimited — no quota cap on this plan.

subscription.title: Subscription Status
subscription.description: Your current subscription state and next renewal.
subscription.noSubscription: You are on the free tier — no paid subscription.

banner.pastDueBody: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method in the billing portal to keep your subscription active.
banner.canceledBody: Your subscription is set to cancel on {date}. You'll keep access until then.

plans.title: Available Plans
plans.description: Choose the plan that fits your usage.
plans.empty: No plans are available right now.

error.notConfiguredBody: This instance has not been configured with a Stripe account, so billing actions are unavailable. Contact your administrator if you believe this is unexpected.
error.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
error.portalFailed: Failed to open the billing portal. Please try again.
error.noStripeCustomer: Subscribe to a paid plan first to manage billing details.
